text:
There's a myth about Threads automation. Here's the reality:

The official Meta API isn't a workaround. It's the legal path Meta designed for this. No scraping. No browser hacks. Just clean code talking to Meta's servers.

This account runs on it. Posts daily. Improves daily. Zero bans. Two hours to set up with free tools.

The difference between risky automation and smart automation? The API.

Grab the blueprint (link in bio)
